name: pomodoro-ai
description: Manage Pomodoro focus sessions, breaks, and productivity analytics. By MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: start_session
tools.description: Start a new Pomodoro focus session. Optionally specify a task name and custom duration (default uses configured timer).

tools.name: stop_session
tools.description: Stop the current Pomodoro session. Mark as completed or interrupted. Add optional notes.

tools.name: get_stats
tools.description: Get Pomodoro productivity statistics for the last N days (default 7).

tools.name: configure_timer
tools.description: Configure Pomodoro timer durations. Customise work, short break, long break, and session count before long break.

tools.name: get_productivity_report
tools.description: Generate a detailed productivity report with insights and recommendations.
